design_philosophy: Authoritative, objective, and transparent. Merging the traditional trust of a legal institution (serif fonts, deep navy) with the precision of a modern AI control room (sharp grid borders, sterile sans-serif data points).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-slate-900

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding p-6 or p-8.
layout.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' Grid for the Analysis Dashboard. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Marketing pages use wide asymmetrical grids.
layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and data. Center-align hero headings only if it heavily improves balance.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-white), sharp edges or max rounded-sm, 1px solid border (border-slate-200). NO drop shadows by default. Adopt the 'Grid Borders' look.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200. Ensure it z-indexes above content properly.
surfaces.modals: Solid bg-white, border border-slate-200, sharp corners (rounded-sm), shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)].

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary: bg-[#0B192C] text-white hover:bg-[#1E293B]. Secondary: border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but force rounded-sm, bg-white, border-slate-300 focus:border-[#0B192C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0B192C].
components.tabs: Used for LLM Council deliberation view. Bottom border indicator style rather than pill style to maintain a rigid, technical look.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn chart components using objective monochrome colors plus the gold accent (#C5A059) for primary data highlights.

images.description: Modern minimalist legal library. Use for the landing page hero section.
Abstract AI nodes representing the LLM Council deliberation. Use in 'How it works' section or dashboard header backdrop.
Statue of justice holding scales against blue background. Ideal for the About page or features section.
Abstract modern blue/white courthouse building for background or texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Playfair Display' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for all body, cards, and data text.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for the Marketing/Landing page using wide bento layouts and generous spacing.

Use Shadcn UI components for the Analysis Dashboard, Case Submission, and Case History. Strip away default Vercal-like softness: use sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none) and high-contrast borders (border-slate-200/300).

For the LLM Council view, use a Control Room grid. Each AI persona (Prosecution Analyst, Defense Analyst, Legal Scholar, Bias Detector, Chief Justice Synthesizer) must have distinct layout sections but uniform clinical styling.
All interactive elements and key text MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-case-button').
DO NOT use any placeholder images (via.placeholder.com, etc.). Use ONLY the image URLs provided in this JSON.
Maintain strict accessible contrast ratios, particularly for the Brand Navy (#0B192C) and Accent Gold (#C5A059) against white backgrounds.
Use lucide-react for all standard iconography, styled with thin or regular stroke weights.
